name: Cheese Garlic Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Melt butter with garlic and set aside, keeping warm.
3. Mix the baking mix, milk, chives, and shredded cheese until a soft dough forms. Beat vigorously for 30 seconds.
4. Drop the dough by spoonfuls onto an ungreased baking sheet.
5. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until golden brown. Remove from the oven.
6. Brush the garlic butter mixture over the warm biscuits immediately, before removing them from the baking sheet.
